<ul><li>The passive bonus damage applies to turrets.</li>
<li>When <i>An Acquired Taste</i> is applied by <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Tongue Lash" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Tongue_Lash" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Tongue_Lash">Tongue Lash</a></span></span>, the damage is dealt as an <b>additional</b> instance of damage (as opposed to <b>bonus</b> damage when applied by basic attacks).
<ul><li>This causes effects like <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Bone Plating" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Bone_Plating" title="An icon representing Bone Plating"><img alt="An icon representing Bone Plating" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bone_Plating_rune.png/20px-Bone_Plating_rune.png?a2255" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bone_Plating_rune.png/40px-Bone_Plating_rune.png?a2255 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Bone_Plating" title="Bone Plating">Bone Plating</a></span></span> and <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Bloodletter's Curse" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Bloodletter%27s_Curse" title="An icon for the item Bloodletter's Curse"><img alt="An icon for the item Bloodletter's Curse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Bloodletter%27s_Curse_item.png/20px-Bloodletter%27s_Curse_item.png?c79ca" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Bloodletter%27s_Curse_item.png/40px-Bloodletter%27s_Curse_item.png?c79ca 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Bloodletter%27s_Curse" title="Bloodletter's Curse">Bloodletter's Curse's</a></span></span> <a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Vile_Decay" title="Named item effect">Vile Decay</a> to be applied twice.</li></ul></li></ul>

<ul><li><b>Tongue Lash's</b> range and speed scale 1:1 alongside any <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Size"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Unit_size" title="An icon representing the keyword Gameplay radius"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Gameplay radius" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gameplay_radius.png/20px-Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gameplay_radius.png/40px-Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Unit_size" title="Unit size">size</a></span> modifiers to <b>Tahm Kench</b>, but will not be reduced <i>below</i> their base values if his overall size modifier is smaller than 100%.
<ul><li>As the missile range and speed scale simultaneously, <b>Tongue Lash</b> will always take <span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="0.32142857142857 seconds, but rounded up to the next game tick.">0.<small>33</small> seconds</span> to reach its maximum range (no matter the cast range).</li>
<li>Because of this, increasing <b>Tahm Kench's</b> size with items such as <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Elixir of Iron" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Elixir_of_Iron" title="An icon for the item Elixir of Iron"><img alt="An icon for the item Elixir of Iron" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Elixir_of_Iron_item.png/20px-Elixir_of_Iron_item.png?c39f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Elixir_of_Iron_item.png/40px-Elixir_of_Iron_item.png?c39f0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Elixir_of_Iron" title="Elixir of Iron">Elixir of Iron</a></span></span> allows him to hit targets at even the same distance more quickly and giving them less time to dodge.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Devour" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Devour" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Devour">Devour</a></span></span> can be 'queued' at any point during <i>Tongue Lash</i> (including the wind-up animation) and will not go on cooldown if <b>Tahm Kench</b> fails to hit a valid target with <i>Tongue Lash</i>.</li>
<li>All three <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="An Acquired Taste" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#An_Acquired_Taste" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#An_Acquired_Taste">An Acquired Taste</a></span></span> stacks will be consumed even if <i>Tongue Lash's</i> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stun"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stun" title="An icon representing the keyword Stun"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stun" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stun" class="mw-redirect" title="Stun">stun</a></span> is negated.</li>
<li>This ability will cast from wherever the caster is at the start of the cast time.</li></ul>

<div class="ability-info-description"><span class="template_sbc"><b>Passive:</b></span> <b>Tahm Kench</b> stores a portion of the <span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="Damage calculated after modifiers">post-mitigation damage</span> he takes as <a href="/en-us/Health#Grey_health" title="Health">grey health</a> on his <a href="/en-us/Health_bar" title="Health bar">health bar</a>, increased while there are at least 2 nearby <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight" title="An icon representing the keyword Sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sight_icon.png/20px-Sight_icon.png?0aaf0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Sight_icon.png?0aaf0 2x" data-file-width="26" data-file-height="26"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight" title="Sight">visible</a></span> enemy champions either dead or alive. He can store up to <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">300% of his <b>maximum</b> health</span>.</div>

<div class="ability-info-description no-stats"><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> <b>Tahm Kench</b> converts his current <a href="/en-us/Health#Grey_health" title="Health">grey health</a> into a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Shield" title="An icon representing the keyword Shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_resistances_icon.png/20px-Hybrid_resistances_icon.png?18138" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_resistances_icon.png/40px-Hybrid_resistances_icon.png?18138 2x" data-file-width="121" data-file-height="121"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Shield" title="Shield">shield</a></span> that lasts for 2.<small>5</small> seconds.</div>

<div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"><div class="infobox"><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Targeting input</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><a href="/en-us/Targeting#Auto" title="Targeting">Auto</a></div></div><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Affects</div><div class="infobox-data-value">Self</div></div></div></div></div>
<ul><li><i>Thick Skin</i> shield value and <i>grey health</i> percentage heal are both boosted by effects that increase heal and shield power. This means <b>Tahm Kench</b> can technically heal more than the normal amount of <i>grey health</i> and get a shield bigger than his maximum health.
<ul><li>At level 18 <b>Tahm Kench</b> would need 53.<small>8</small>% <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Heal_and_shield_power" title="Heal and shield power"><img src="/en-us/images/Heal_power_icon.svg?42353" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> heal power</span> to heal for 100% of the damage he takes, reduced to 34.<small>9</small>% with <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Revitalize" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Revitalize" title="An icon representing Revitalize"><img alt="An icon representing Revitalize" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Revitalize_rune.png/20px-Revitalize_rune.png?07dd7" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Revitalize_rune.png/40px-Revitalize_rune.png?07dd7 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Revitalize" title="Revitalize">Revitalize</a></span></span>, 23.<small>1</small>% with <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Spirit Visage" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spirit_Visage" title="An icon for the item Spirit Visage"><img alt="An icon for the item Spirit Visage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Spirit_Visage_item.png/20px-Spirit_Visage_item.png?14937" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Spirit_Visage_item.png/40px-Spirit_Visage_item.png?14937 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Spirit_Visage" title="Spirit Visage">Spirit Visage</a></span></span>, and 6.<small>9</small>% with both.</li></ul></li>
<li><i>Grey health</i> converts all post-mitigation damage, <i>Thick Skin</i> effectively grants <i>Tahm Kench</i> a form of <span style="color: #F9966B; white-space:normal">true damage</span> mitigation.</li>
<li><i>Grey health</i> can temporarily exceed 100% of his missing health when <b>Tahm Kench</b> <span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="Any other source of healing besides Thick Skin">heals through other means</span> with a <i>grey health</i> bar at 100%. In that case he will keep the higher <i>grey health</i> value for a few moments until it updates and removes the amount that he healed.</li></ul>

<div class="ability-info-description no-stats"><i><b>Tahm Kench</b> is <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Lockout"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Terminology#Lockout" title="An icon representing the keyword Lockout"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Lockout" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Lockout_icon_2.png/20px-Lockout_icon_2.png?5e81e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Lockout_icon_2.png/40px-Lockout_icon_2.png?5e81e 2x" data-file-width="44" data-file-height="44"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Terminology#Lockout" title="Terminology">unable to act</a></span> for 0.<small>4</small> seconds after casting Regurgitate. If Regurgitate was cast automatically, <b>Tahm Kench</b> spits the target out in his facing direction.</i></div>

</p><div style="padding:0.5em 1em;"><div class="infobox"><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Targeting input</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><a href="/en-us/Targeting#Unit" title="Targeting">Unit</a></div></div><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Target out-of-range override</div><div class="infobox-data-value">Walk in range of the target unit to cast</div></div><div class="infobox-section-stacked"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Affects</div><div class="infobox-data-value">Self, Enemies / Allies</div></div></div></div><div class="infobox-header">Counters</div><div class="infobox-section-cell"><div class="infobox-data-row"><div class="infobox-data-label">Spell shield</div><div class="infobox-data-value"><span title="This ability will be blocked by spell shields. • Edge of Night • Banshee's Veil • Nocturne's Shroud of Darkness • Sivir's Spell Shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/56px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="56" height="56" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span><br>Blocked</span></div></div></div></div>
<ul><li><i>Devour's</i> initial pull is a non-<span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne" title="An icon representing the keyword Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect" title="Airborne">airborne</a></span> displacement that displaces the target toward <b>Tahm Kench</b> over the ability's cast time.
<ul><li>This is also the same displacement that is used for when <i>Devour</i> is cast with <i><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Tongue Lash" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Tongue_Lash" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Tongue_Lash">Tongue Lash</a></span></span></i>, though with a greater pull distance as well as faster pull speed to account for <i>Devour's</i> short cast time.</li>
<li>The target will <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blink"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blink" title="An icon representing the keyword Blink"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blink" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/20px-Flash.png?3cd4f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/40px-Flash.png?3cd4f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blink" title="Blink">blink</a></span> to <b>Tahm Kench's</b> location at the end of this displacement, including if it is interrupted.</li></ul></li>
<li>Against enemies, <i>Devour's</i> pull from abducting the target depends on the application of the <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Suppression"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression" title="An icon representing the keyword Suppression"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Suppression" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/20px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/40px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression" title="Types of Crowd Control">suppression</a></span>; if the suppression is not applied, neither is the pull. Similarly, if the suppression is removed, the displacement from the pull is stopped.
<ul><li>The attachment also depends upon the occurrence of the pull; if the target is not pulled, they are not attached to <b>Tahm Kench</b> and the swallow fails, cancelling the ability entirely.</li>
<li>If the target resists the suppression by being <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cc-immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity" title="An icon representing the keyword Cc-Immune"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cc-Immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/20px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cc-immune_icon.png/40px-Cc-immune_icon.png?85815 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immunity" title="Crowd control">immune to crowd control</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Displacement immune"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/20px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/40px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="Crowd control">displacement immune</a></span>, or having a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Spell_shield" title="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Spell shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/20px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sivir_Spell_Shield.png/40px-Sivir_Spell_Shield.png?4c4d1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Spell_shield" title="Spell shield">spell shield</a></span>, <b>Tahm Kench</b> will not pull the target towards him.</li>
<li>If the target removes the suppression by any means, including with an applicable <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cleanse"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/20px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/40px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="Crowd control">cleanse</a></span> effect or <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dispel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Dispel"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dispel" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/20px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/40px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">dispel</a></span>, one of two of the following interactions will occur based on the timing of the removal:
<ul><li>If the suppression was removed during <i>Devour's</i> cast time, the target will stop the displacement from the pull instantly and prevent themselves from being attached to <b>Tahm Kench</b> after the cast time.</li>
<li>If the suppression was removed while the target is attached to <b>Tahm Kench</b> (in other words, inside of his belly), the target will detach themselves from him instantly without <b>Tahm Kench</b> performing <i><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Regurgitate" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Regurgitate" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Regurgitate"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Regurgitate" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Regurgitate.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Regurgitate.png?fd938" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Regurgitate.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Regurgitate.png?fd938 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Regurgitate">Regurgitate</a></span></span></i>.</li></ul></li></ul></li>
<li>The <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Untargetability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetable" title="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/20px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/40px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetable" class="mw-redirect" title="Untargetable">untargetability</a></span> and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Displacement immunity"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/20px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/40px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="Crowd control">displacement immunity</a></span> is granted to the target during <i>Devour's</i> cast time as well. Enemies are granted these effects while they are suppressed; they are removed when the suppression is.</li>
<li><i>Devour's</i> suppression against enemies is removed if <b>Tahm Kench</b> dies, enters <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Resurrection"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Death#Ways_to_prevent_death_when_reaching_zero_health" title="An icon representing the keyword Resurrection"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Resurrection" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Revival_icon.png/20px-Revival_icon.png?4c111" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Revival_icon.png/40px-Revival_icon.png?4c111 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Death#Ways_to_prevent_death_when_reaching_zero_health" title="Death">resurrection</a></span>, or transitions in or out of the <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Mordekaiser" data-ability="Realm of Death" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mordekaiser#Realm_of_Death" title="An icon for Mordekaiser's ability Realm of Death"><img alt="An icon for Mordekaiser's ability Realm of Death" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mordekaiser_Realm_of_Death.png/20px-Mordekaiser_Realm_of_Death.png?9696f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mordekaiser_Realm_of_Death.png/40px-Mordekaiser_Realm_of_Death.png?9696f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Mordekaiser#Realm_of_Death" title="Mordekaiser">Death Realm</a></span></span>.</li>

<ul><li>This only occurs for the former if <b>Tahm Kench</b> is in a different dimension from the target.</li></ul></li>
<li><i>Devour</i> cannot be used on allies that are <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Channel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Channel" title="An icon representing the keyword Channel"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Channel" src="/en-us/images/Channeling_icon.svg?d2ab8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Channel" title="Channel">channeling</a></span> or using an ability that preloads <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Unstoppableforcemarker"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#UnstoppableForceMarker" title="Crowd control">UnstoppableForceMarker</a></span>.</li>
<li>The <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Slow"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Slow" title="An icon representing the keyword Slow"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Slow" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/20px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/40px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Slow" class="mw-redirect" title="Slow">self-slow</a></span> is affected by <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Slow resist"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Slow_resist" title="An icon representing the keyword Slow resist"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Slow resist" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_immune_icon.png/20px-Slow_immune_icon.png?4ad41" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_immune_icon.png/40px-Slow_immune_icon.png?4ad41 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Slow_resist" title="Slow resist">slow resist</a></span>.</li>
<li><b>Tahm Kench</b> cannot use <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Gates"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Warp_gate" title="An icon representing the keyword Warp gate"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Warp gate" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hex-gate_icon.png/20px-Hex-gate_icon.png?ce25f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hex-gate_icon.png/40px-Hex-gate_icon.png?ce25f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Warp_gate" title="Warp gate">gates</a></span> during <i>Devour</i>.</li>
<li>Allies can see if this spell is ready next to <b>Tahm Kench's</b> health bar.</li>
<li>The swallowed target is not considered to be <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Vanish"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetability#Vanish" title="An icon representing the keyword Vanish"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Vanish" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shaco_Hallucinate.png/20px-Shaco_Hallucinate.png?3222c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shaco_Hallucinate.png/40px-Shaco_Hallucinate.png?3222c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetability#Vanish" title="Untargetability">vanished</a></span>. They are instead hidden below the visible map plane, to maintain ongoing effects such as <span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna" title="An icon representing Senna"><img alt="An icon representing Senna" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Senna_OriginalSquare.png?98201" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Senna_OriginalSquare.png?98201 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Senna" title="Senna">Senna's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Senna" data-ability="Curse of the Black Mist" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Curse_of_the_Black_Mist" title="An icon for Senna's ability Curse of the Black Mist"><img alt="An icon for Senna's ability Curse of the Black Mist" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Curse_of_the_Black_Mist.png/20px-Senna_Curse_of_the_Black_Mist.png?cd4e0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Senna_Curse_of_the_Black_Mist.png/40px-Senna_Curse_of_the_Black_Mist.png?cd4e0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Senna#Curse_of_the_Black_Mist" title="Senna">Curse of the Black Mist</a></span></span></span>.</li>

<div style="overflow:auto; max-height:500px; width:auto; margin:3px 0; border:1px solid var(--league-grey-2); padding:0 0.5em 0 0.5em; box-sizing:border-box; -moz-box-sizing:border-box; -moz-border-radius-topleft:0.5em; background:var(--body-mid); border-radius:4px;">
<dl><dt><a href="/en-us/V26.09" title="V26.09">V26.09</a></dt></dl>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Thick Skin" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Thick_Skin" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Thick Skin"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Thick Skin" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png?0b682" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png?0b682 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Thick_Skin">Thick Skin</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Grey Health into health conversion increased to <span class="pp-tooltip" style="position:relative; border-bottom:1px dotted; cursor:help;" data-start="60;" data-finish="100;" data-bot-values="60;62.35;64.71;67.06;69.41;71.76;74.12;76.47;78.82;81.18;83.53;85.88;88.24;90.59;92.94;95.29;97.65;100" data-bot-key="%">60% – 100% (based on level)</span> from <span class="pp-tooltip" style="position:relative; border-bottom:1px dotted; cursor:help;" data-start="45;" data-finish="100;" data-bot-values="45;48.24;51.47;54.71;57.94;61.18;64.41;67.65;70.88;74.12;77.35;80.59;83.82;87.06;90.29;93.53;96.76;100" data-bot-key="%">45% – 100% (based on level)</span>.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Devour" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Devour" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Devour">Devour</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Bonus movement speed on ally Devour increased to 60% from 40%.</li></ul></li></ul>
<dl><dt><a href="/en-us/V26.08" title="V26.08">V26.08</a></dt></dl>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="An Acquired Taste" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#An_Acquired_Taste" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#An_Acquired_Taste">An Acquired Taste</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Base damage changed to <span class="pp-tooltip" style="position:relative; border-bottom:1px dotted; cursor:help;" data-start="5;" data-finish="60;" data-bot-values="5;10;15;20;25;30;35;40;45;50;55;60">5 – 60 (based on level)</span> from <span class="pp-tooltip" style="position:relative; border-bottom:1px dotted; cursor:help;" data-displayformula="2 + 4 per level until level 10, then +6 per level, capped at level 11" data-bot-values="6;10;14;18;22;26;30;34;38;42;48">6 – 48 (based on level)</span>.</li>
<li>Bonus health ratio reduced to <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">4% of Tahm Kench's <b>bonus</b> health</span> from <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">4.<small>5</small>%</span></li>
<li>AP ratio reduced to <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">1.<small>25</small>% AP</span> <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">per 100 <b>bonus</b> health</span> from <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">1.<small>5</small>%</span></li></ul></li></ul>

<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="An Acquired Taste" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#An_Acquired_Taste" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#An_Acquired_Taste">An Acquired Taste</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Health ratio increased to <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">4.<small>5</small>% <b>bonus</b> health</span> from <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">4%</span>.</li></ul></li></ul>

<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Bug Fix:</b></span> No longer grants <b>Tahm Kench</b> the effects of <span class="inline-image label-after buff-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-buff="Cloud Dragon Soul" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Cloud_Dragon_Soul" title="An icon representing the Cloud Dragon Soul neutral buff"><img alt="An icon representing the Cloud Dragon Soul neutral buff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Cloud_Dragon_Soul_buff.png/20px-Cloud_Dragon_Soul_buff.png?f3c30" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Cloud_Dragon_Soul_buff.png/40px-Cloud_Dragon_Soul_buff.png?f3c30 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Cloud_Dragon_Soul" class="mw-redirect" title="Cloud Dragon Soul">Cloud Dragon Soul</a></span></span> upon using the ability on any target to acquire them (i.e. even on targets who are out of range) instead of upon the ability being cast.</li></ul></li></ul>

<ul><li><i>Swapped with <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Devour" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Devour" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Devour">Devour</a></span></span></i>.</li>
<li>Renamed to <i>Abyssal Dive</i> from <i>Abyssal Voyage</i>.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> <b>Tahm Kench</b> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Channel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Channel" title="An icon representing the keyword Channel"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Channel" src="/en-us/images/Channeling_icon.svg?d2ab8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Channel" title="Channel">channels</a></span> for 1.<small>35</small> seconds, and upon completion <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blink"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blink" title="An icon representing the keyword Blink"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blink" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/20px-Flash.png?3cd4f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/40px-Flash.png?3cd4f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blink" title="Blink">blinks</a></span> to the target location after a 0.<small>15</small>-second delay. Upon arrival, he deals 100 / 135 / 170 / 205 / 240 <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">(+ 100% AP)</span> magic damage to nearby enemies and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne" title="An icon representing the keyword Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect" title="Airborne">knocks them up</a></span> and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stun"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stun" title="An icon representing the keyword Stun"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stun" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stun" class="mw-redirect" title="Stun">stuns</a></span> them for 1 second. Hitting at least 1 enemy champion refunds 30% of the cooldown and mana cost.
<ul><li>Enemies can see the indicator of this ability after he has channeled for 0.<small>75</small> seconds.</li>
<li>Allies may travel with <b>Tahm</b> if they are <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Devour" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Devour" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Devour">Devoured</a></span></span>, but can still exit early at any time.</li>
<li><b>Tahm Kench</b> is <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Lockout"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Terminology#Lockout" title="An icon representing the keyword Lockout"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Lockout" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Lockout_icon_2.png/20px-Lockout_icon_2.png?5e81e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Lockout_icon_2.png/40px-Lockout_icon_2.png?5e81e 2x" data-file-width="44" data-file-height="44"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Terminology#Lockout" title="Terminology">unable to act</a></span> for 0.<small>65</small> seconds after the end of the channel.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cooldown:</b></span> 21 / 20 / 19 / 18 / 17 seconds.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Mana Cost:</b></span> 60 / 75 / 90 / 105 / 120.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cast Range:</b></span> 1000 / 1050 / 1100 / 1150 / 1200.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Thick Skin" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Thick_Skin" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Thick Skin"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Thick Skin" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png?0b682" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png?0b682 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Thick_Skin">Thick Skin</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Grey health timer increased to 4 seconds from 2.<small>5</small>.</li>
<li>Shield duration increased to 2.<small>5</small> seconds from 2.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>New Effect:</b></span> Grey health is now capped at <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">300% <b>maximum</b> health</span>.</li>
<li>Healing changed to <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">10% <b>maximum</b> health</span> per <span class="basic-tooltip" style="border-bottom:1px dotted gray;cursor:help;" title="0.25 seconds, but rounded up to the next game tick.">0.<small>264</small> seconds</span> from <span class="pp-tooltip" style="position:relative; border-bottom:1px dotted; cursor:help;" data-bot-values="12;17;23;30;38;46;55;65;76;88;100;112;125;141;157;173;190;209">12 – 209 (based on level)</span> per 0.<small>8</small> seconds.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Devour" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Devour" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Devour">Devour</a></span></span> (R)
<ul><li><i>Swapped with <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Abyssal Voyage" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Abyssal_Voyage" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Abyssal Voyage"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Abyssal Voyage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Voyage.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Voyage.png?5cf81" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Voyage.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Voyage.png?5cf81 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Abyssal_Voyage">Abyssal Voyage</a></span></span>.</i></li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> <b>Tahm Kench</b> swallows the target <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion" title="An icon representing the keyword Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champion</a></span> for up to 3 seconds, rendering them <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Vanish"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetability#Vanish" title="An icon representing the keyword Vanish"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Vanish" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Shaco_Hallucinate.png/20px-Shaco_Hallucinate.png?3222c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Shaco_Hallucinate.png/40px-Shaco_Hallucinate.png?3222c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetability#Vanish" title="Untargetability">vanished</a></span> and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Lockout"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Terminology#Lockout" title="An icon representing the keyword Lockout"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Lockout" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Lockout_icon_2.png/20px-Lockout_icon_2.png?5e81e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Lockout_icon_2.png/40px-Lockout_icon_2.png?5e81e 2x" data-file-width="44" data-file-height="44"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Terminology#Lockout" title="Terminology">unable to act</a></span>, as well as granting them <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Displacement immunity"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Displacement immune" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/20px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Unstoppable_icon.png/40px-Unstoppable_icon.png?dce0a 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Displacement_Immunity" title="Crowd control">displacement immunity</a></span> for the duration. <i>Devour</i> can be recast after 1 second, and does so automatically at the end of the duration.
<ul><li><i>Devour</i> will not automatically recast while <b>Tahm Kench</b> is performing <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Abyssal Dive" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Abyssal_Dive" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Abyssal Dive"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Abyssal Dive" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Dive.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Dive.png?e579f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Dive.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Dive.png?e579f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Abyssal_Dive">Abyssal Dive</a></span></span>, and will instead do so after he has finished.</li>
<li>If the target is an ally, they are granted a 300 / 450 / 600 <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">(+ 100% AP)</span> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Shield"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Shield" title="An icon representing the keyword Shield"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Shield" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_resistances_icon.png/20px-Hybrid_resistances_icon.png?18138" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_resistances_icon.png/40px-Hybrid_resistances_icon.png?18138 2x" data-file-width="121" data-file-height="121"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Shield" title="Shield">shield</a></span> for 2.<small>5</small> seconds, refreshing after being spat out.
<ul><li>Allies can exit at will by inputting a movement command, unless they're <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Immobilize"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immobilizing" title="An icon representing the keyword Immobilize"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Immobilize" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Immobilizing" title="Crowd control">immobilized</a></span> or the recast is on cooldown.</li>
<li><b>Tahm Kench</b> is unable to cast movement spells and is <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Slow"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Slow" title="An icon representing the keyword Slow"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Slow" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/20px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/40px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Slow" class="mw-redirect" title="Slow">slowed</a></span> by 40 / 25 / 10% while an ally is swallowed, but may still cast <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Abyssal Dive" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Abyssal_Dive" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Abyssal Dive"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Abyssal Dive" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Dive.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Dive.png?e579f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Dive.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Dive.png?e579f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Abyssal_Dive">Abyssal Dive</a></span></span>.</li>
<li>Allies can see if this spell is ready next to his health bar.</li></ul></li>
<li>If the target is an enemy, they are <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Suppression"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression" title="An icon representing the keyword Suppression"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Suppression" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/20px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Suppression_icon.png/40px-Suppression_icon.png?f6602 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Suppression" title="Types of Crowd Control">suppressed</a></span> for the duration and dealt 100 / 250 / 400 <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">(+ 15% <span style="color: #7A6DFF; white-space:normal">(+ 5% per 100 AP)</span> of the target's <b>maximum</b> health)</span> magic damage after being spat out.
<ul><li><i>Devour</i> can only be cast on enemies with 3 stacks of <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="An Acquired Taste" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#An_Acquired_Taste" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#An_Acquired_Taste">An Acquired Taste</a></span></span>, consuming the stacks in the process.</li>
<li><b>Tahm Kench</b> is <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ground"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ground" title="An icon representing the keyword Ground"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ground" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/20px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/40px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ground" class="mw-redirect" title="Ground">grounded</a></span> and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Slow"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Slow" title="An icon representing the keyword Slow"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Slow" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/20px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/40px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Slow" class="mw-redirect" title="Slow">slowed</a></span> by 40% while an enemy is swallowed.</li></ul></li></ul></li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Recast:</b></span> <b>Tahm Kench</b> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne" title="An icon representing the keyword Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect" title="Airborne">spits</a></span> the target out in the target direction.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cooldown:</b></span> 120 / 100 / 80 seconds.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Mana Cost:</b></span> 100.</li></ul></li></ul>

<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Undocumented:</b></span> Spit out <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Monsters"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Monster" title="An icon representing the keyword Monster"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Monster" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Monster_icon.png/20px-Monster_icon.png?e9efe" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Monster_icon.png?e9efe 2x" data-file-width="24" data-file-height="24"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Monster" title="Monster">monsters</a></span> now take the proper damage again.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Thick Skin" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Thick_Skin" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Thick Skin"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Thick Skin" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png?0b682" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png?0b682 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Thick_Skin">Thick Skin</a></span></span>

<ul><li>Health ratio increased to <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">4% of his <b>maximum</b> health</span> from <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">2.<small>5</small>%</span>.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Tongue Lash" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Tongue_Lash" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Tongue_Lash">Tongue Lash</a></span></span>

<dl><dt><a href="/en-us/V9.14" title="V9.14">V9.14</a></dt></dl>
<ul><li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="An Acquired Taste" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#An_Acquired_Taste" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#An_Acquired_Taste">An Acquired Taste</a></span></span>
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Removed:</b></span> Abilities no longer deal bonus magic damage based on passive stacks.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Removed:</b></span> Abilities no longer apply <i>An Acquired Taste</i> stacks.</li>
<li>Health ratio changed to <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">2.<small>5</small>% of his <b>maximum</b> health</span> at any stack from <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal"><span class="pp-tooltip" style="position:relative; border-bottom:1px dotted; cursor:help;" data-top-label="stacks" data-start="1.5;0" data-finish="4.5;2" data-bot-values="1.5;3;4.5" data-top-values="0;1;2" data-bot-key="%">1.<small>5</small>% / 3% / 4.<small>5</small>% (based on stacks)</span></span>.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Tongue Lash" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Tongue_Lash" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Tongue_Lash">Tongue Lash</a></span></span>
<ul><li>Cooldown increased to 8 / 7.<small>5</small> / 7 / 6.<small>5</small> / 6 seconds from 8 / 7 / 6 / 5 / 4.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Removed:</b></span> No longer hits enemies in an arc in front of him on cast.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>New Effect:</b></span> Now consumes all stacks of <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="An Acquired Taste" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#An_Acquired_Taste" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#An_Acquired_Taste">An Acquired Taste</a></span></span> upon stunning an enemy.</li>

<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="An Acquired Taste" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#An_Acquired_Taste" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability An Acquired Taste" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_An_Acquired_Taste.png?c62f0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#An_Acquired_Taste">An Acquired Taste</a></span></span>
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Innate:</b></span> Tahm Kench's basic attacks and damaging spells apply stacks of An Acquired Taste to enemy champions. At three stacks, Tongue Lash and Devour become empowered against that champion.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Tongue Lash" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Tongue_Lash" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Tongue Lash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Tongue_Lash">Tongue Lash</a></span></span>
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> Damage the first enemy hit for 80/115/150/185/220 (+.7 AP) magic damage and slow them by 30 / 40 / 50 / 60 / 70% for 2 seconds. Champions with 3 stacks of An Acquired Taste will additionally be stunned for 1.5 seconds. Activate Devour while your tongue is in mid-air to devour monsters/minions from a distance.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Target Range:</b></span> 800.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Mana Cost:</b></span> 50.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cooldown:</b></span> 6 seconds.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Devour" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Devour" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Devour" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Devour.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Devour.png?8b291 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Devour">Devour</a></span></span>
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> Tahm Kench devours a target for 4/4.5/5/5.5/6s (half that for enemy champions.) Enemies are dealt 20 / 23 / 26 / 29 / 32% (+.02 AP)% of their maximum health as magic damage. (maximum of 400/450/500/550/600 against neutral monsters).</li>
<li>Enemy Champions: Requires 3 stacks of An Acquired Taste to be devoured. While holding an enemy champion, Tahm Kench is slowed by 95%</li>
<li>Allied Champions: While holding an allied champion, Tahm Kench gains 30 / 35 / 40 / 45 / 50% movement speed toward enemy champions (halved when not moving toward enemy champions).</li>
<li>Minions and monsters: Reactivate to spit, dealing 100/150/200/250/300 (+0.6 AP) magic damage to targets hit.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Target Range:</b></span> 250.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Mana Cost:</b></span> 90.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cooldown:</b></span> 14 / 13 / 12 / 11 / 10 seconds.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Thick Skin" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Thick_Skin" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Thick Skin"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Thick Skin" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png?0b682" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Thick_Skin.png?0b682 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Thick_Skin">Thick Skin</a></span></span>
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Passive:</b></span> While this spell is not cooling down, damage taken by Tahm Kench  is converted to grey health. If allowed to decay, 20/26/32/38/44% of grey health will turn back into health.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> Convert all of your grey health into a shield that lasts 6 seconds, but falls off gradually over that time.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Mana Cost:</b></span> 50.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cooldown:</b></span> 16 / 15 / 14 / 13 / 12 seconds.</li></ul></li>
<li><span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Tahm Kench" data-ability="Abyssal Voyage" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tahm_Kench#Abyssal_Voyage" title="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Abyssal Voyage"><img alt="An icon for Tahm Kench's ability Abyssal Voyage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Voyage.png/20px-Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Voyage.png?5cf81" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Voyage.png/40px-Tahm_Kench_Abyssal_Voyage.png?5cf81 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a class="mw-selflink-fragment" href="#Abyssal_Voyage">Abyssal Voyage</a></span></span>
<ul><li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Passive:</b></span> Tahm Kench's basic attacks and damaging spells deal an additional (20 + 4/5/6% of Tahm Kench's bonus health) magic damage</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> Tahm Kench's begins to channel for up to 15 seconds. During this time, one ally champion can right click Tahm Kench to join in. Alternatively, reactivate this ability to travel alone. On reactivation or once an ally has opted in, Tahm travels to the target location. Incoming champion damage breaks the channel.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Target Range:</b></span> 5000/5500/6000.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Mana Cost:</b></span> 100.</li>
<li><span class="template_sbc"><b>Cooldown:</b></span> 160 / 130 / 100 seconds.</li></ul></li></ul></div>

<li>Tahm Kench's design and playstyle may be loosely based on the Banderhobb, a toad-like creature from the Forgotten Realms universe which kidnaps unsuspecting victims by swallowing them alive and carrying them to its master's lair.</li>
