<li><span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tiki" title="An icon representing Tiki"><img alt="An icon representing Tiki" src="/en-us/images/thumb/TikiSquare.png/20px-TikiSquare.png?b4890" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/TikiSquare.png/40px-TikiSquare.png?b4890 2x" data-file-width="146" data-file-height="146"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Tiki" class="mw-redirect" title="Tiki">Tiki</a></span></span></li>
<li><span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Urf" title="An icon representing Urf"><img alt="An icon representing Urf" src="/en-us/images/thumb/UrfSquare.png/20px-UrfSquare.png?6d852" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/UrfSquare.png/40px-UrfSquare.png?6d852 2x" data-file-width="133" data-file-height="137"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Urf" class="mw-redirect" title="Urf">Urf</a></span></span></li>
<li><span class="inline-image unit-icon label-after" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param=""><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Well" title="An icon representing Well"><img alt="An icon representing Well" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Well_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Well_OriginalSquare.png?d96f0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Well_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Well_OriginalSquare.png?d96f0 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Well" title="Well">Well</a></span></span></li></ul>
</div>
</td></tr>
</tbody></table></div>
</div><div class="hidden-metadata navigation-not-searchable"><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack windup</span></div>
The <b>attack windup</b> is a portion of the <span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/File:Basic_Attack.png" class="mw-file-description"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a> animation that must play out in order to launch it. For <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">projectile</a></span> basic attacks, the windup usually aligns with drawing the projectile on-screen.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The attack windup is displayed as a percentage, and any windup modifier is listed as a decimal next to it.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Attack speed ratio</span></div>
<p>The <b>Attack speed ratio (AS ratio)</b> adjusts the effectiveness of bonus AS from all sources. It is usually equal to the unit's base AS (level 1 with no bonuses), but tuning to a higher or lower relative value translates to more or less bonus AS received compared to other units with the same base AS. 
</p>
<center><big>Total AS = Base AS + Bonus AS × <span style="color: #D929D9; white-space:normal"><b>AS Ratio</b></span></big><br><i>(All values in decimal form)</i></center><hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The ingame stats HUD displays the <b>AS ratio</b> instead of base AS to communicate this comparative effectiveness. The Wiki opts to always list both stats and show the <b>AS ratio</b> as "N/A" if the two are equal.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gameplay_radius.png/44px-Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Gameplay_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Gameplay radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>gameplay radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that most closely resembles the concept of a 'hitbox', and is the radius used for <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="An icon representing the keyword Edge range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range">edge range</a></span> effects, which include <a href="/en-us/Basic_attacks" class="mw-redirect" title="Basic attacks">basic attacks</a>, <a href="/en-us/Direction-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Direction-targeted">line collision missiles</a>, rectangular AOEs, and others. The gameplay radius determines the reach of both incoming and outgoing effects: for example, enemies are within a unit's <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> basic attack range</span> based on the edge of their gameplay radius and vice versa.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_radius.png/44px-Selection_radius.png?7345c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_radius.png?7345c 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>selection radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the horizontally furthest point from the center of their model that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Pathing_radius.png/44px-Pathing_radius.png?ee4af" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Pathing_radius.png?ee4af 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Pathing radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>pathing radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the gameplay area they occupy for unit-collision and pathfinding logic. A unit's center cannot intersect with another unit's <b>pathing radius</b>, unless one of them is <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ghosted"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Unit_collision" title="An icon representing the keyword Ghosted"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ghosted" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/20px-Ghost.png?ee615" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ghost.png/40px-Ghost.png?ee615 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Unit_collision" title="Unit collision">ghosted</a></span>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Selection_height.png/44px-Selection_height.png?8e760" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="43" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Selection_height.png?8e760 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="71"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Selection height</span></div>
A unit's <b>selection height</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the vertically furthest point from the center of their model at the ground that other players' cursor is allowed to be, while still maintaining the ability to select that unit.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Gameplay in <a href="/en-us/League_of_Legends" title="League of Legends">League of Legends</a> takes place in two dimensions no matter the visuals. However, a virtual <i>height</i> dimension that is perpendicular to the ground creates the game's three-dimensional view, which in combination with the camera's perspective necessitates the usage of the <b>selection height</b>.</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Acquisition_range.png/44px-Acquisition_range.png?72c63" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Acquisition_range.png?72c63 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Acquisition radius</span></div>
<p>A unit's <b>acquisition range</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that determines the distance at which they will acquire <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a></span> targets when a target unit is not specified by the player.
</p>
<ul><li>Auto-attacking <i>automatically</i> orders an idle champion to acquire enemies within this range. This can be disabled in the <a href="/en-us/Settings" title="Settings">Settings</a>.</li>
<li>Attack-move commands scan for targets within this range while moving toward a given location.</li></ul>
<p><b>Acquisition range</b> is calculated from the champion's <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Er"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="An icon representing the keyword Edge range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span></span> edge to the edge of other units.<br>
<span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:inherit; white-space:normal">Attack range</span></span> bonuses modify the champion's <b>acquisition range</b> by the same amount.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Top_icon.png/44px-Top_icon.png?58442" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Top_icon.png/88px-Top_icon.png?58442 2x" data-file-width="136" data-file-height="136"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Top</span></div>
<p>Within a <a href="/en-us/Drafted_team" class="mw-redirect" title="Drafted team">drafted team</a>, the <i>Top Laner</i> is the champion assigned to the top lane.
</p>
<p>
<span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Juggernaut"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Juggernaut_(Class)" title="An icon representing the keyword Juggernaut"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Juggernaut" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/20px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/40px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Juggernaut_(Class)" class="mw-redirect" title="Juggernaut (Class)">Juggernauts</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Diver"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Diver" title="An icon representing the keyword Diver"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Diver" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/20px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Fighter_icon.png/40px-Fighter_icon.png?e3f07 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Diver" class="mw-redirect" title="Diver">Divers</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Battlemage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Battlemage" title="An icon representing the keyword Battlemage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Battlemage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/20px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mage_icon.png/40px-Mage_icon.png?c4c84 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Battlemage" class="mw-redirect" title="Battlemage">Battlemages</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/44px-Tank_icon.png?d2561" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Tank_icon.png/88px-Tank_icon.png?d2561 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Warden</span></div>
<i>Tanks</i> excel in shrugging off incoming damage and focus on disrupting their enemies more than being significant damage threats themselves.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<i>Wardens</i> are defensive tanks. Wardens stand steadfast, seeking to hold the line by persistently locking down any on-comers who try to pass them. Wardens keep their allies out of harm’s way and allow them to safely deal with enemies caught in the fray.</p>
<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><dl><dt>Examples</dt></dl>

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/44px-Controller_icon.png?728f3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Controller_icon.png/88px-Controller_icon.png?728f3 2x" data-file-width="192" data-file-height="192"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Support (Legacy)</span></div>
<p><b>Support</b> refers to a broad roster of champions who support their allies. As this description is better suited to the champion's role within a drafted team, individual supports can vary wildly from champions that can create opportunities for their allies by disrupting the enemy, defensive casters whose abilities empower their allies and more durable champions that hold their team's front line.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/44px-Mana_resource.png?5be85" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Mana_resource.png/88px-Mana_resource.png?5be85 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Mana</span></div>
<p><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Mana" title="Mana"><img src="/en-us/images/Mana_icon.svg?d5eaf" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <b>Mana</b></span> (also known as <b>MP</b>) is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that is the resource of many <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champions</a> necessary to cast most of their <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>. Mana can be restored via <a href="/en-us/Mana_regeneration" title="Mana regeneration">mana regeneration</a> and some <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a>, <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a>, <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a>, and <a href="/en-us/Buff" title="Buff">buffs</a>.<br><br><b>Mana</b> is represented in-game by the blue bar within the HUD, indicating the champion's <b>current</b> mana and <b>maximum</b> mana. <b>Current</b> mana is reduced by expenditure through paying an ability's mana <i>cost</i>.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/44px-Melee_role.png?166b1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/88px-Melee_role.png?166b1 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Melee</span></div>
<p><b>Melee</b> champions have a basic attack <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> range</span> usually within 200 units. A melee attack does not use a projectile to deal damage, therefore not subject to effects that mitigate projectiles, like <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Yasuo" data-ability="Wind Wall" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall" title="An icon for Yasuo's ability Wind Wall"><img alt="An icon for Yasuo's ability Wind Wall" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/20px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png/40px-Yasuo_Wind_Wall.png?0ffbb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Yasuo#Wind_Wall" title="Yasuo">Wind Wall</a></span></span>. Some champions can shift between a ranged and melee form, and certain items/runes differ for melee characters.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/44px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Basic attack</span></div>
The <b>basic attack</b> (or "auto") is the default means by which a unit deals damage, usually equaling <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_damage" title="Attack damage"><img src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage_icon.svg?51c73" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color:orange; white-space:normal">100% AD</span></span> <span style="color: #FF8C34; white-space:normal">physical damage</span>. <b>Basic attacks</b> are normally unit-targeted <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="An icon representing the keyword Edge range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range">edge range</a></span> spells, and the <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> attack range</span> stat determines their reach.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The caster must stand still to complete a brief <i>windup</i> before launching a <b>basic attack</b>. Depending on the caster:
</p><ul><li>If a caster's attacks are non-projectile (e.g. <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Melee"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Melee" title="An icon representing the keyword Melee"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Melee" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/20px-Melee_role.png?166b1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Melee_role.png/40px-Melee_role.png?166b1 2x" data-file-width="168" data-file-height="168"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Melee" class="mw-redirect" title="Melee">melee</a></span>) launching the attack deals damage immediately.</li>
<li>If a caster's attacks are <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Projectile"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="An icon representing the keyword Projectile"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Projectile" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/20px-Projectile.png?af216" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Projectile.png/40px-Projectile.png?af216 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Projectile" title="Projectile">projectile</a></span>, launching the attack sends a projectile that follows the target and deals damage upon striking them.</li></ul>
The caster then incurs a brief cooldown, based on their <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_speed" title="Attack speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/15px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Attack_speed_icon.png/30px-Attack_speed_icon.png?50a17 2x" data-file-width="56" data-file-height="56"></a></span> <span style="color: #F5EE99; white-space:normal">attack speed</span></span>. Basic attacks' damage may trigger <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage" title="Damage">on-hit effects</a></span> only upon dealing damage. <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking" title="An icon representing the keyword On-attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-attack" src="/en-us/images/On-attack_icon.svg?88ec8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="512" data-file-height="512"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Attacking" title="Attack effects">On-attack</a></span> effects will always trigger upon the attack's <i>windup</i> completing.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style="width:500px;box-sizing:content-box;">
<div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div class="abilitytooltip blurb skill skill_q" style="overflow:hidden; position:relative; line-height: 20px;">
<table width="100%" style="border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);">
<tbody><tr>
<td style="font-size:140%; color: #9797fc; font-weight:bold; text-shadow: 0 2px black; padding-right:14px;"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Template:Data_Tahm_Kench/Tongue_Lash" title="Template:Data Tahm Kench/Tongue Lash"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png/48px-Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="48" height="48" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Tahm_Kench_Tongue_Lash.png?c5cb8 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> Tongue Lash

Stacking effects with durations will refresh per instance, unless otherwise stated.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Stacking effects that time out may cause all stacks to expire at once or one by one in given intervals, depending on the source.</p>

</td></tr></tbody></table><table style="width:100%;"><tbody><tr><td style="vertical-align:top; padding: 0 0 0 2px; text-align: left;"><p><span class="template_sbc"><b>Active:</b></span> <b>Tahm Kench</b> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne" title="An icon representing the keyword Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect" title="Airborne">spits</a></span> the swallowed champion in the target direction. If they are an enemy, he deals <span style="color: #00B0F0; white-space:normal">magic damage</span> based on the <span style="color: #21B053; white-space:normal">target's <b>maximum</b> health</span>.</p></td></tr>
</tbody></table></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/44px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="37" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/88px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">On-hit effect</span></div>
<b>On-hit</b> is an umbrella term for a type of effect that triggers on instances of <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Basic damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/20px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_Attack.png/40px-Basic_Attack.png?66a25 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage" title="Damage">basic damage</a></span>, or generally upon a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Basic attack"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Basic attack" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/20px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png/40px-Basic_attack_cursor_icon.png?03ba3 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attack</a></span> or certain attack-like <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="An icon representing the keyword Champion ability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion ability" src="/en-us/images/Champion_ability.svg?8f232" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">ability</a></span> hitting a target. Most on-hit effects deal <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Proc damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Proc damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/20px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/40px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage" title="Damage">proc damage</a></span> or <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Default damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Default damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Default damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png/20px-Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png?da188" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png/40px-Minion_Dematerializer_rune.png?da188 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Damage" title="Damage">default damage</a></span>, which are non-reactive (= the effects don't trigger more effects).<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><ul><li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Critical strikes"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Critical strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/20px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Critical_strike_icon.png/40px-Critical_strike_icon.png?d199f 2x" data-file-width="144" data-file-height="144"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Critical_strike" title="Critical strike">Critical strikes</a></span> are <b>not</b> on-hit effects. An ability listed as applying on-hit effects cannot critically strike unless otherwise stated.</li>
<li><span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> Life steal</span></span> is <b>not</b> an on-hit effect. Damage from on-hit effects normally does not apply life steal, unless those effects deal <i>basic damage</i> or are special-cased to benefit from life steal.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul>

<p class="mw-empty-elt">
</p><hr>The ability counterpart to <b>on-hit effects</b> are <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="Ability effects">ability effects</a></span>, which apply on instances of <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Ability damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/20px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/40px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_damage" title="Ability damage">ability damage</a></span>.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Wit%27s_End_item.png/44px-Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Wit%27s_End_item.png?723a1 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Proc damage</span></div>
<i>Proc damage</i> is damage type assigned to most <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="On-hit"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting" title="An icon representing the keyword On-hit"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword On-hit" src="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/20px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="17" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/On-hit_icon.png/40px-On-hit_icon.png?a8736 2x" data-file-width="173" data-file-height="146"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Attack_effects#On_Hitting" title="Attack effects">on-hit</a></span> effects. It is worth noting that many seeming on-hit effects are actually classified as <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Ability damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/20px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Karthus_Lay_Waste.png/40px-Karthus_Lay_Waste.png?9badb 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_damage" title="Ability damage">ability damage</a></span> and so will trigger <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ability effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="Ability effects">ability effects</a></span>. Some forms of on-hit damage, such as by <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Blade of the Ruined King" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blade_of_the_Ruined_King" title="An icon for the item Blade of the Ruined King"><img alt="An icon for the item Blade of the Ruined King" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blade_of_the_Ruined_King_item.png/20px-Blade_of_the_Ruined_King_item.png?f5f23" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blade_of_the_Ruined_King_item.png/40px-Blade_of_the_Ruined_King_item.png?f5f23 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Blade_of_the_Ruined_King" title="Blade of the Ruined King">Blade of the Ruined King</a></span></span> and <span class="inline-image item-icon item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Sheen" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sheen" title="An icon for the item Sheen"><img alt="An icon for the item Sheen" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sheen_item.png/20px-Sheen_item.png?2bece" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sheen_item.png/40px-Sheen_item.png?2bece 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span></span> <a href="/en-us/Named_item_effect#Spellblade" title="Named item effect">Spellblade</a>, also benefit from <span style="color: #CC2051; white-space:normal"><span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Life_steal" title="Life steal"><img src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> life steal</span></span>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<i>Proc damage</i> does not interact with most other effects, such as <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Luden's Echo" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Luden%27s_Echo" title="An icon for the item Luden's Echo"><img alt="An icon for the item Luden's Echo" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Luden%27s_Tempest_item.png/20px-Luden%27s_Tempest_item.png?e80fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Luden%27s_Tempest_item.png/40px-Luden%27s_Tempest_item.png?e80fc 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Luden%27s_Echo" title="Luden's Echo">Luden's Echo</a></span></span> or <span class="inline-image label-after rune-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-rune="Arcane Comet" data-game="lol"><span style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Arcane_Comet" title="An icon representing Arcane Comet"><img alt="An icon representing Arcane Comet" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Arcane_Comet_rune.png/20px-Arcane_Comet_rune.png?cffe0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Arcane_Comet_rune.png/40px-Arcane_Comet_rune.png?cffe0 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span></span> <span style="word-break: keep-all;"><a href="/en-us/Arcane_Comet" title="Arcane Comet">Arcane Comet</a></span></span>. The main exception is:
</p><ul><li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Omnivamp"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Vamp#Omnivamp" title="An icon representing the keyword Omnivamp"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Omnivamp" src="/en-us/images/Omnivamp_colored_icon.svg?8811b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Vamp#Omnivamp" title="Vamp">Omnivamp</a></span> and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical vamp"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Vamp#Physical_vamp" title="An icon representing the keyword Physical vamp"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical vamp" src="/en-us/images/Life_steal_icon.svg?6c8ea" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Vamp#Physical_vamp" title="Vamp">Physical vamp</a></span> (where applicable) heal for a percentage of damage dealt.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul>

<p>
Effects triggered by damage subtypes (<span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage" title="Physical damage">physical</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Magic damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Magic_damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Magic damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Magic damage" src="/en-us/images/Magic_damage.svg?f4db1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Magic_damage" title="Magic damage">magic</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/True_damage" title="An icon representing the keyword True damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_penetration.png/20px-Hybrid_penetration.png?d6752" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_penetration.png/40px-Hybrid_penetration.png?d6752 2x" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/True_damage" title="True damage">true</a></span>) will always occur regardless of damage type (e.g. <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Black Cleaver" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Black_Cleaver" title="An icon for the item Black Cleaver"><img alt="An icon for the item Black Cleaver" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Black_Cleaver_item.png/20px-Black_Cleaver_item.png?98eed" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Black_Cleaver_item.png/40px-Black_Cleaver_item.png?98eed 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Black_Cleaver" title="Black Cleaver">Black Cleaver's</a></span></span> Carve stacking on instances of <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage" title="Physical damage">physical damage</a></span> and <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Morellonomicon" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Morellonomicon" title="An icon for the item Morellonomicon"><img alt="An icon for the item Morellonomicon" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Morellonomicon_item.png/20px-Morellonomicon_item.png?e9bc2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Morellonomicon_item.png/40px-Morellonomicon_item.png?e9bc2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Morellonomicon" title="Morellonomicon">Morellonomicon's</a></span></span> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Magic_damage.svg?f4db1" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; <li><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/File:Magic_Damage_Shield.png" class="mw-file-description"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Magic_Damage_Shield.png/20px-Magic_Damage_Shield.png?9e442" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Magic_Damage_Shield.png/40px-Magic_Damage_Shield.png?9e442 2x" data-file-width="121" data-file-height="121"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Shield#Magic_shields" title="Shield">Magic shields</a></li></ul></li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/44px-Range_center.png?cbed4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/88px-Range_center.png?cbed4 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Centered range</span></div>
<p><b>Centered range</b> is calculated from the <b>center</b> of a source unit's hitbox to the <b>center</b> of a target unit's hitbox.
</p>
<ul><li>Centered range is used for most <a href="/en-us/Targeting#Unit-targeted" title="Targeting">unit-targeted</a> abilities.</li>
<li>It is <i>less</i> effective and may seem to have diminished reach against <a href="/en-us/Unit_size" title="Unit size">large</a> units.</li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/44px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/88px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Edge range</span></div>
<p><b>Edge range</b> is calculated from the <b>edge</b> of a source unit's hitbox to the <b>edge</b> of a target unit's hitbox.
</p>
<ul><li>Edge range is mostly used for <a href="/en-us/Basic_attack" title="Basic attack">basic attacks</a>; <a href="/en-us/Targeting#Direction-targeted" title="Targeting">skill shots</a>; and point-blank areas of effect (including <a href="/en-us/Aura" title="Aura">auras</a>).</li>
<li>These become <i>more</i> effective against large champions, as the source gains more reach against them. This may be favorable or unfavorable: durable champions tend to be larger and thus easier to hit, and frail champions tend to be smaller and more difficult to hit.</li></ul>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Slow_icon.png/44px-Slow_icon.png?2e57e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Slow_icon.png?2e57e 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Slow</span></div>
A unit that is <i>slowed</i> has reduced <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/15px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/30px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed">movement speed</a></span> for the duration. <i>Slows</i> based on a percentage value cannot reduce a target below <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Movement_speed" title="Movement speed"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/15px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Movement_speed_icon.png/30px-Movement_speed_icon.png?f928e 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">110 movement speed</span></span>. Some <i>slows</i> will instead modify the target's <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">movement speed</span> to a static value, which may not be further reduced nor increased.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Only the slow with the highest value is taken into movement speed calculations. All additional slows are ignored until the higher-valued slow wears off. The strength of slows may amplify or decay over their duration. Slows of the same debuff cannot stack and will instead refresh on each application unless otherwise stated.</p><hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Negative <i>slow</i> values will increase the unit's <span style="color: #9FFF4D; white-space:normal">movement speed</span> instead.</p>
<hr style="border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 2px 0px;">

<p>
Crowd control applied by one's self or an ally cannot be countered in any way, neither <i>reduced</i> in duration, <i>resisted</i>, nor <i>removed</i> unless special cased to do so.
</p><ul><li>The crowd control effect may still be <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cleanse"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/20px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/40px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="Crowd control">cleansed</a></span> if it is applied as a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; <p>
Crowd control applied by one's self or an ally cannot be countered in any way, neither <i>reduced</i> in duration, <i>resisted</i>, nor <i>removed</i> unless special cased to do so.
</p><ul><li>The crowd control effect may still be <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Cleanse"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Cleanse" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/20px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png/40px-Gangplank_Remove_Scurvy.png?f02e2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Removal" title="Crowd control">cleansed</a></span> if it is applied as a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; font-weight: bold;">Lockout</span></div>
A champion that is <i>locked out</i> is unable to perform certain actions such as casting abilities, moving, or attacking due to currently performing another action that must complete. The prevented actions can vary per instance.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
Lockout does not interact with <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control" title="Crowd control">crowd control</a> mechanics unless otherwise stated.</p>

<p>A unit's <b>gameplay radius</b> is a <a href="/en-us/Champion_statistic" title="Champion statistic">stat</a> that most closely resembles the concept of a 'hitbox', and is the radius used for <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Edge range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="An icon representing the keyword Edge range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Edge range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/20px-Range_model.png?9f7ec" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_model.png/40px-Range_model.png?9f7ec 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range">edge range</a></span> effects, which include <a href="/en-us/Basic_attacks" class="mw-redirect" title="Basic attacks">basic attacks</a>, <a href="/en-us/Direction-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Direction-targeted">line collision missiles</a>, rectangular AOEs, and others. The gameplay radius determines the reach of both incoming and outgoing effects: for example, enemies are within a unit's <span style="white-space:nowrap"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range"><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/15px-Range_icon.png?ae16f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="15" height="15" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_icon.png/30px-Range_icon.png?ae16f 2x" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></a></span> basic attack range</span> based on the edge of their gameplay radius and vice versa.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Annie_Disintegrate.png/44px-Annie_Disintegrate.png?bbde6" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Annie_Disintegrate.png?bbde6 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Spell damage</span></div>
<p><i>Spell damage</i> is the damage type dealt by most <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a> and some <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a> and <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a> that affect targets directly, usually a single one. <i>Spell damage</i> applies <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="Ability effects">spell effects</a></span> by default.
</p>

font-weight: bold;">Resurrection</span></div>
A unit that is protected by <b>Resurrection</b> will enter a revival state and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dispel"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Dispel"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dispel" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/20px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Anivia_Rebirth.png/40px-Anivia_Rebirth.png?e5074 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">dispel</a></span> most <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Debuff"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="An icon representing the keyword Debuff"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Debuff" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/20px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png/40px-Malzahar_Malefic_Visions.png?15f44 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Debuff" title="Debuff">debuffs</a></span> upon taking <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Death"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Death" title="An icon representing the keyword Death"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Death" src="/en-us/images/Death_icon.svg?70f06" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="52" data-file-height="52"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Death" title="Death">fatal damage</a></span>. After the state completes, the unit is revived. <b>Resurrection</b> effects do not count for kills or assists.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Resurrection</b> sources have a hierarchy, and will trigger in the following order:
