Entering <b>resurrection</b> does not cancel cast times. <span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Renata Glasc" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Renata_Glasc" title="An icon representing Renata Glasc"><img alt="An icon representing Renata Glasc" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Renata_Glasc_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Renata_Glasc_OriginalSquare.png?1300f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Renata_Glasc_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Renata_Glasc_OriginalSquare.png?1300f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Renata_Glasc" title="Renata Glasc">Renata Glasc's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Renata Glasc" data-ability="Bailout" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Renata_Glasc#Bailout" title="An icon for Renata Glasc's ability Bailout"><img alt="An icon for Renata Glasc's ability Bailout" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Renata_Glasc_Bailout.png/20px-Renata_Glasc_Bailout.png?39be5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Renata_Glasc_Bailout.png/40px-Renata_Glasc_Bailout.png?39be5 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Renata_Glasc#Bailout" title="Renata Glasc">Bailout</a></span></span></span> always takes priority over <b>resurrection</b>.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/The_Thinking_Manatee_profileicon.png/44px-The_Thinking_Manatee_profileicon.png?81148" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/The_Thinking_Manatee_profileicon.png/88px-The_Thinking_Manatee_profileicon.png?81148 2x" data-file-width="300" data-file-height="300"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Ultra Rapid Fire (U.R.F.)</span></div>
<p><b>Ultra Rapid Fire</b> is a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Featured game mode"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Featured_game_mode" title="An icon representing the keyword Featured game mode"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Featured game mode" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Featured_Game_Mode_icon.png/20px-Featured_Game_Mode_icon.png?c8bf2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Featured_Game_Mode_icon.png/40px-Featured_Game_Mode_icon.png?c8bf2 2x" data-file-width="100" data-file-height="100"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Featured_game_mode" title="Featured game mode">Featured Game Mode</a></span> that takes place on <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Summoner's rift"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Summoner%27s_Rift" title="An icon representing the keyword Summoner's rift"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Summoner's rift" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png/20px-Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png?7a043" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png/40px-Summoner%27s_Rift_icon.png?7a043 2x" data-file-width="100" data-file-height="100"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Summoner%27s_Rift" title="Summoner's Rift">Summoner's Rift</a></span> with the same objective as <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Classic 5v5"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Classic" title="An icon representing the keyword Classic"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Classic" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Red_Nexus_icon.png/20px-Red_Nexus_icon.png?2515b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Red_Nexus_icon.png?2515b 2x" data-file-width="36" data-file-height="36"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Classic" title="Classic">Classic 5v5</a></span>, except all <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Champion"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion" title="An icon representing the keyword Champion"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/20px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Champion_icon.png/40px-Champion_icon.png?2d7b0 2x" data-file-width="200" data-file-height="200"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion" title="Champion">champions</a></span> benefit from the <span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ultra_Rapid_Fire/Patch_and_Buff_History#Buff_History" title="An icon for the Awesome Buff of Awesomely Awesome Buffing buff in Ultra Rapid Fire"><img alt="An icon for the Awesome Buff of Awesomely Awesome Buffing buff in Ultra Rapid Fire" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Awesome_Buff_of_Awesomely_Awesome_Buffing_buff.png/20px-Awesome_Buff_of_Awesomely_Awesome_Buffing_buff.png?eced0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Awesome_Buff_of_Awesomely_Awesome_Buffing_buff.png/40px-Awesome_Buff_of_Awesomely_Awesome_Buffing_buff.png?eced0 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ultra_Rapid_Fire/Patch_and_Buff_History#Buff_History" title="Ultra Rapid Fire/Patch and Buff History">Awesome Buff of Awesomely Awesome Buffing</a> that grants excessive ability haste and removes ability costs. The gameplay is <i>explosive</i>. The game mode can be played as <i><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="All random"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/All_random" title="An icon representing the keyword All random"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword All random" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Reroll.png/20px-Reroll.png?9383d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Reroll.png/40px-Reroll.png?9383d 2x" data-file-width="150" data-file-height="150"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/All_random" class="mw-redirect" title="All random">All Random</a></span></i> or <i><a href="/en-us/Blind_pick" class="mw-redirect" title="Blind pick">Blind pick</a></i> depending on the year.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Sight_icon.png?0aaf0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="26" data-file-height="26"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Sight</span></div>
<b>Sight</b> is a property of <a href="/en-us/Unit" title="Unit">units</a>, <a href="/en-us/Structures" class="mw-redirect" title="Structures">structures</a>, certain <a href="/en-us/Summoner_spell" title="Summoner spell">summoner spells</a>, <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a>, and <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a> that represents a team possessing vision of a target area or unit. It is always <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Center range"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Range" title="An icon representing the keyword Centered range"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Centered range" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/20px-Range_center.png?cbed4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Range_center.png/40px-Range_center.png?cbed4 2x" data-file-width="480" data-file-height="480"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Range" title="Range">center range</a></span>. A line of vision cannot extend beyond terrain or an unrevealed brush.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Sight</b> can also refer to an effect that makes a unit visible regardless of the fog of war or <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Brush"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Brush" title="An icon representing the keyword Brush"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Brush" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_Brushmaker.png/20px-Ivern_Brushmaker.png?4c89b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Ivern_Brushmaker.png/40px-Ivern_Brushmaker.png?4c89b 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Brush" title="Brush">brush</a></span>, allowing them to be targeted. <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Standard sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#Standard_sight" title="An icon representing the keyword Standard sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Standard sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Reveal_icon.png/20px-Reveal_icon.png?8f092" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Reveal_icon.png/40px-Reveal_icon.png?8f092 2x" data-file-width="256" data-file-height="256"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#Standard_sight" title="Sight">Standard sight</a></span> cannot see <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stealth"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth" title="An icon representing the keyword Stealth"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stealth" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png/20px-Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png/40px-Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth" title="Stealth">stealthed</a></span> units, but <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight" title="An icon representing the keyword True sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/20px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/True_Sight_icon.png/40px-True_Sight_icon.png?8830f 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#True_sight" title="Sight">True Sight</a></span> can.
</p><ul><li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Nearsight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Nearsight" title="An icon representing the keyword Nearsight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Nearsight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Nearsight_icon.png/20px-Nearsight_icon.png?70ec5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Nearsight_icon.png/40px-Nearsight_icon.png?70ec5 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Nearsight" class="mw-redirect" title="Nearsight">Nearsight</a></span> is a <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Crowd control"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control" title="An icon representing the keyword Crowd control"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Crowd control" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control" title="Crowd control">crowd control</a></span> debuff that inhibits <b>sight</b>; allied vision is lost in addition to a reduced sight radius.</li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Obscured vision"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#Obscured_vision" title="An icon representing the keyword Obscured vision"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Obscured vision" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sweeper_Drone_icon.png/20px-Sweeper_Drone_icon.png?6e3eb" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sweeper_Drone_icon.png/40px-Sweeper_Drone_icon.png?6e3eb 2x" data-file-width="80" data-file-height="80"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#Obscured_vision" title="Sight">Obscured vision</a></span> is similar to <b>sight</b> in a way that it can observe units, but does not render units <i>targetable</i>, rather it exposes their position and informs of their presence.</li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Unobstructed vision"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight#Unobstructed_vision" title="An icon representing the keyword Unobstructed vision"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Unobstructed vision" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stealth_Ward_icon.png/20px-Stealth_Ward_icon.png?0305b" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stealth_Ward_icon.png/40px-Stealth_Ward_icon.png?0305b 2x" data-file-width="80" data-file-height="80"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight#Unobstructed_vision" title="Sight">Unobstructed vision</a></span> is a form of <b>sight</b> that allows a unit to be able to see their full vision radius, ignoring any obstructions that would otherwise restrict visibility.</li>
<li>All effects that use <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Unit-targeted"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Unit-targeted" title="An icon representing the keyword Unit-targeted"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Unit-targeted" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Leap_Strike.png/20px-Jax_Leap_Strike.png?0e517" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Leap_Strike.png/40px-Jax_Leap_Strike.png?0e517 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Unit-targeted" class="mw-redirect" title="Unit-targeted">unit-targeting</a></span> require <b>sight</b> of the target. Delayed <i>unit-targeted</i> attacks and spells can cancel if <b>sight</b> of the selected target is suddenly lost.<p class="mw-empty-elt"></p></li></ul>

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/Channeling_icon.svg?d2ab8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="72" data-file-height="72"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Channel</span></div>
<p>A <b>channeled ability</b> is an ability that can be prevented from reaching its conclusion, by the user themself and / or because of other effects.
</p><p>A <b>charged</b> ability has a channel that is toggled by two activations - the first begins the charging and the second will fire the ability. While using <a href="/en-us/Controls_and_Hotkeys#Casting_modes" title="Controls and Hotkeys">Quick cast</a>, the player must keep the hotkey held down to charge the ability and release to fire. Unlike normal channels, the caster is still able to move freely and cast movement abilities, unless otherwise stated.
</p>
A <b>movement channel</b> is a type of channel which also involves the caster moving from their position, usually in the form of traversal such as <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Dash"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Dash" title="An icon representing the keyword Dash"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Dash" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/20px-Dash.png?e5c61" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Dash.png/40px-Dash.png?e5c61 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Dash" title="Dash">dashes</a></span> and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Blink"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Blink" title="An icon representing the keyword Blink"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Blink" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/20px-Flash.png?3cd4f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/40px-Flash.png?3cd4f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Blink" title="Blink">blinks</a></span>. This means the crowd control effects <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Ground"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ground" title="An icon representing the keyword Ground"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ground" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/20px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Grounded_icon.png/40px-Grounded_icon.png?1f132 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ground" class="mw-redirect" title="Ground">ground</a></span> and <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Root"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Root" title="An icon representing the keyword Root"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Root" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Root_icon.png/20px-Root_icon.png?80b80" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Root_icon.png/40px-Root_icon.png?80b80 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Root" class="mw-redirect" title="Root">root</a></span>, which both inhibit the activation of movement spells, can interrupt the channel.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
The following <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Crowd control"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control" title="An icon representing the keyword Crowd control"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Crowd control" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/20px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stun_icon.png/40px-Stun_icon.png?cacf8 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control" title="Crowd control">crowd control</a></span> effects will <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Interrupt"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Disruption" title="An icon representing the keyword Interrupt"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Interrupt" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/20px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/40px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Crowd_control#Disruption" title="Crowd control">interrupt</a></span> all <b>channels</b> (except uninterruptible ones):
</p><ul><li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Airborne"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Airborne" title="An icon representing the keyword Airborne"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Airborne" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/20px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Airborne_icon.png/40px-Airborne_icon.png?931fc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Airborne" class="mw-redirect" title="Airborne">Airborne</a></span></li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Forced action"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Forced_action" title="An icon representing the keyword Forced action"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Forced action" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Forced_action_icons.png/20px-Forced_action_icons.png?93658" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Forced_action_icons.png/40px-Forced_action_icons.png?93658 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Forced_action" title="Types of Crowd Control">Forced action</a></span> (<span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Charm"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Charm" title="An icon representing the keyword Charm"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Charm" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Charm_icon.png/20px-Charm_icon.png?4ef91" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Charm_icon.png/40px-Charm_icon.png?4ef91 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Charm" class="mw-redirect" title="Charm">Charm</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Flee"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Flee" title="An icon representing the keyword Flee"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Flee" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flee_icon.png/20px-Flee_icon.png?929b7" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Flee_icon.png/40px-Flee_icon.png?929b7 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Flee" class="mw-redirect" title="Flee">Flee</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Taunt"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Taunt" title="An icon representing the keyword Taunt"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Taunt" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Taunt_icon.png/20px-Taunt_icon.png?8affc" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Taunt_icon.png/40px-Taunt_icon.png?8affc 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Taunt" class="mw-redirect" title="Taunt">Taunt</a></span>)</li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Silence"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Silence" title="An icon representing the keyword Silence"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Silence" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/20px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/40px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Silence" class="mw-redirect" title="Silence">Silence</a></span> (<span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Disrupt"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Disrupt" title="An icon representing the keyword Disrupt"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Disrupt" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/20px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/40px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Disrupt" title="Types of Crowd Control">Disrupt</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Polymorph"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Polymorph" title="An icon representing the keyword Polymorph"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Polymorph" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/20px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Silence_icon.png/40px-Silence_icon.png?70ec5 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Polymorph" title="Types of Crowd Control">Polymorph</a></span>)</li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Sleep"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Sleep" title="An icon representing the keyword Sleep"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Sleep" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sleep_icon.png/20px-Sleep_icon.png?a43b9" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Sleep_icon.png/40px-Sleep_icon.png?a43b9 2x" data-file-width="65" data-file-height="65"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Sleep" title="Types of Crowd Control">Sleep</a></span></li>
<li><span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stasis"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Stasis" title="An icon representing the keyword Stasis"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stasis" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Stasis_icon.png/20px-Stasis_icon.png?d7c0d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Stasis_icon.png/40px-Stasis_icon.png?d7c0d 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Types_of_Crowd_Control#Stasis" title="Types of Crowd Control">Stasis</a></span></li>

</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Flash.png/44px-Flash.png?3cd4f" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Flash.png?3cd4f 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Blink</span></div>
<p>A <b>blink</b> refers to a form of movement whereby a unit displaces from point A to B without traversing the space between.
</p>
</div></div><div class="blue-tooltip" style=""><div style="text-align:center; font-size:0.9em; font-weight:bold; margin-top:4px; margin-bottom:4px;"><div style="background:#163474; color:#CCC;line-height:15px; padding:5px 0 5px 0; border-radius:2px;"><div style="display:inline; vertical-align:middle;"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/20px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="21" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png/40px-League_of_Legends_icon_nav.png?c4f67 2x" data-file-width="49" data-file-height="52"></span></span></div> League of Legends content</div></div><div style="width: 550px; margin:5px;"><div style="margin-bottom:5px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25);"><span typeof="mw:File"><span><img src="/en-us/images/thumb/Ziggs_Mega_Inferno_Bomb.png/44px-Ziggs_Mega_Inferno_Bomb.png?af8a4" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="44" height="44" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Ziggs_Mega_Inferno_Bomb.png?af8a4 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></span></span> <span class="tooltip-header" style="font-size: 140%; font-weight: bold;">Area damage</span></div>
<p><i>Area damage</i> is the damage type dealt by most <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Abilities"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="An icon representing the keyword Champion ability"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Champion ability" src="/en-us/images/Champion_ability.svg?8f232" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Champion_ability" title="Champion ability">abilities</a></span> and some <a href="/en-us/Item" title="Item">items</a> and <a href="/en-us/Rune" title="Rune">runes</a> that can hit targets within a zone. <i>Area damage</i> applies <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Spell effects"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Ability effects" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/20px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Blackfire_Torch_item.png/40px-Blackfire_Torch_item.png?3e150 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Ability_effects" title="Ability effects">spell effects</a></span> by default.
</p>
<ul><li><span class="champion-ability-icon"><span class="inline-image label-after champion-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Jax" data-skin="Original" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Jax" title="An icon representing Jax"><img alt="An icon representing Jax" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_OriginalSquare.png/20px-Jax_OriginalSquare.png?6209d" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_OriginalSquare.png/40px-Jax_OriginalSquare.png?6209d 2x" data-file-width="128" data-file-height="128"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Jax" title="Jax">Jax's</a></span></span> <span class="inline-image label-after ability-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-champion="Jax" data-ability="Counter Strike" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Jax#Counter_Strike" title="An icon for Jax's ability Counter Strike"><img alt="An icon for Jax's ability Counter Strike" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike.png/20px-Jax_Counter_Strike.png?a3a78" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Jax_Counter_Strike.png/40px-Jax_Counter_Strike.png?a3a78 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Jax#Counter_Strike" title="Jax">Counter Strike</a></span></span></span> grants him 25% damage reduction against all incoming <i>area damage</i>.</li>

<p>
Effects triggered by damage subtypes (<span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage" title="Physical damage">physical</a></span>, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="True damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/True_damage" title="An icon representing the keyword True damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword True damage" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_penetration.png/20px-Hybrid_penetration.png?d6752" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Hybrid_penetration.png/40px-Hybrid_penetration.png?d6752 2x" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/True_damage" title="True damage">true</a></span>) will always occur regardless of damage type (e.g. <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Black Cleaver" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Black_Cleaver" title="An icon for the item Black Cleaver"><img alt="An icon for the item Black Cleaver" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Black_Cleaver_item.png/20px-Black_Cleaver_item.png?98eed" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Black_Cleaver_item.png/40px-Black_Cleaver_item.png?98eed 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Black_Cleaver" title="Black Cleaver">Black Cleaver's</a></span></span> Carve stacking on instances of <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Physical damage"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Physical_damage" title="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Physical damage" src="/en-us/images/Attack_damage.svg?4c659" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" data-file-width="163" data-file-height="163"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Physical_damage" title="Physical damage">physical damage</a></span> and <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Morellonomicon" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Morellonomicon" title="An icon for the item Morellonomicon"><img alt="An icon for the item Morellonomicon" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Morellonomicon_item.png/20px-Morellonomicon_item.png?e9bc2" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Morellonomicon_item.png/40px-Morellonomicon_item.png?e9bc2 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Morellonomicon" title="Morellonomicon">Morellonomicon's</a></span></span> <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; font-weight: bold;">Vanish</span></div>
In addition to granting <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Untargetability"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Untargetable" title="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Untargetable" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/20px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Untargetable_icon.png/40px-Untargetable_icon.png?c022c 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Untargetable" class="mw-redirect" title="Untargetable">untargetability</a></span>, <b>vanish</b> briefly hides a unit from the game's renderer, which causes it to become completely undetectable and invisible even to effects such as <span class="inline-image item-icon label-after item-icon" style="display:inline;white-space:pre;" data-param="" data-item="Oracle Lens" data-game="lol"><span class="border" style="display:inline-block;position:relative;" data-width="20"><span class="mw-image-border" typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Oracle_Lens" title="An icon for the item Oracle Lens"><img alt="An icon for the item Oracle Lens" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Oracle_Lens_item.png/20px-Oracle_Lens_item.png?526ae" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Oracle_Lens_item.png/40px-Oracle_Lens_item.png?526ae 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span></span> <span style="white-space:normal;"><a href="/en-us/Oracle_Lens" title="Oracle Lens">Oracle Lens</a></span></span>. <b>Vanished</b> units are not indicated to be visible on the mini map. <b>Vanished</b> units are <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Lockout"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Terminology#Lockout" title="An icon representing the keyword Lockout"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Lockout" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Lockout_icon_2.png/20px-Lockout_icon_2.png?5e81e" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Lockout_icon_2.png/40px-Lockout_icon_2.png?5e81e 2x" data-file-width="44" data-file-height="44"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Terminology#Lockout" title="Terminology">unable to act</a></span>. As with all untargetability, <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Tether"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Tether" title="An icon representing the keyword Tether"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Tether" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Karma_Focused_Resolve.png/20px-Karma_Focused_Resolve.png?3ca72" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Karma_Focused_Resolve.png/40px-Karma_Focused_Resolve.png?3ca72 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Tether" title="Tether">tethers</a></span> will still persist on a target that <i>vanishes</i>.<hr style="width:90%; border:solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); border-width:0px 0px 1px 0px;">
<p>
<b>Vanish</b> is not considered <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Stealth"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Stealth" title="An icon representing the keyword Stealth"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Stealth" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png/20px-Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/thumb/Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png/40px-Teemo_Guerrilla_Warfare.png?116ff 2x" data-file-width="64" data-file-height="64"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Stealth" title="Stealth">stealth</a></span> and does not interact with <span class="glossary" style="white-space:pre; position:relative;" data-game="lol" data-tip="Sight"><span typeof="mw:File"><a href="/en-us/Sight" title="An icon representing the keyword Sight"><img alt="An icon representing the keyword Sight" src="/en-us/images/thumb/Sight_icon.png/20px-Sight_icon.png?0aaf0" decoding="async" loading="lazy" width="20" height="20" class="mw-file-element" srcset="/en-us/images/Sight_icon.png?0aaf0 2x" data-file-width="26" data-file-height="26"></a></span> <a href="/en-us/Sight" title="Sight">sight</a></span> effects.</p>
</div></div></div>
